regime_hint.notes: NIFTY closed at 24,032.8 (-0.35%), regime shifted TREND_DOWN→RANGING — a positive transition. SGX Nifty +205pts (+0.85%) implies ~+1% gap-up open. US: SPX +0.8%, Nasdaq +1.0% (tech-led). Crude Brent -1.66% ($108.05) is today's primary India macro catalyst. FII net sold Rs 3,621 cr; DII bought Rs 2,603 cr — DII absorbing. VIX unavailable; vol regime LOW from candle data. ATR 1.49%. Treat as RANGING with a mild long bias from gap-up; do not treat as confirmed TRENDING_UP until NIFTY holds above pre-open high through 09:45.

watchlist.notes: #1 scanner (2.318). Crude -1.66% directly expands downstream O2C margins. Earnings estimates revised up 14-31% YoY (Zacks, May 4). Gap -0.21% (benign). Require 2+ confirmations. Invalidated if NIFTY fails gap-up and RELIANCE opens below 1455.

#2 scanner (2.142). World Bank $515M financing for Bhutan hydro JV — positive catalyst confirmed. No event today. Results May 12 = binary risk building mid-week; caution beyond Thursday. Invalidated below 438.

#6 scanner (1.963). Direct beneficiary of crude -1.66% — refining margin expansion. No binary events today. Gap -0.48%. Require 2+ confirmations; crude-driven days can reverse fast. Invalidated if crude rebounds intraday.

#4 scanner (2.096). Organon acquisition ($11.75B) ongoing — headline risk persists but initial -7% gap absorption complete. High vol/momentum. Score elevated due to ATR. No event today. Trade both sides on 2+ confirmations; avoid oversized positions due to acquisition uncertainty.

CEO bribery case quashed by Bombay HC (May 5) — removes overhang. Strong institutional participation May 4 (+1.60%). Gap -0.64%. Score 1.591 is lower but legal catalyst justifies inclusion. Invalidated if broader banking sector sells off on FII pressure.

#12 scanner (1.849). Strong Q4 done (Apr 18, profit +8.5%, NPA 0.33%). SEBI administrative warning May 4 — non-material per disclosure (depository participant, no trading restriction). Gap -0.54%. Require 2+ confirmations given SEBI headline risk.
#11 scanner (1.852). No binary events. Monthly return +6.44% strong; weekly -3.71% tempers enthusiasm. Banking sector benefits from gap-up macro. Gap -0.56%. Clean setup with no pending events.

#13 scanner (1.786). US Nasdaq +1.0% overnight = IT sector tailwind. USD/INR weak (~95) benefits IT exporters. No events until July 16. Put activity at Rs 1,140 strike mildly cautionary — watch for support. Require 2+ confirmations.

HARD BLOCK — outside defined NIFTY 50 target universe (#lesson 2026-05-05). 3 consecutive SL hits yesterday (-Rs 1,039 net on PNB alone). already_stopped_today veto not yet in code — manual block via watchlist bias until code fix.
HARD BLOCK — Q4 results + dividend announcement May 8 (2 days away). Binary event risk building. SEBI warning sector pressure. Do not trade until post-results.

rationale: Gap-UP ~+1% expected (SGX Nifty +205pts). NIFTY regime shifted TREND_DOWN→RANGING — positive transition. Crude oil -1.66% is today's primary macro catalyst: benefits RELIANCE (O2C downstream) and BPCL (refining). FII net sold Rs 3,621 cr but DII absorbed Rs 2,603 cr — market not in freefall. Vol LOW, ATR 1.49%. Top 8 tradeable picks skew long given gap-up setup. Hard blocks: PNB (outside universe, 3x SL yesterday) and SBIN (results May 8). Excluded: ETERNAL (outside universe), KOTAKBANK (post-results NIM selling), BHARTIARTL (Q4 results imminent per Gemini — down 4.27% in 3 days), ADANIENT (ongoing re-entry behavioral risk), INDUSINDBK (volatile, multiple SL hits), ITC (Q4 timing uncertain). Risk tightened after May 5 worst day (-Rs 1,154): max_trades 4 vs 7 default, risk_per_trade 1.0% vs 3.0% default, max_positions 2 vs 4 default.
lessons_applied: #lesson 2026-05-05: PNB is outside the defined NIFTY 50 target universe — hard-blocked today via avoid bias; scanner allowlist code fix still pending
#lesson 2026-05-05: already_stopped_today veto not in code — manually blocked PNB to prevent further same-stock re-entry
#lesson 2026-04-30: Binary-event block — SBIN (results May 8) and BHARTIARTL (Q4 results imminent) both excluded
#lesson 2026-04-29: Require 2+ strategy confirmations for all entries — all tradeable symbols carry this expectation in notes
#lesson 2026-05-04: Re-entry on same stock after SL hit — ADANIENT excluded despite new-week eligibility due to ongoing behavioral risk
#lesson 2026-W18 (promoted): Daily regime is one input, not a directional commitment — RANGING does not prevent long entries if individual stock signals confirm on 2+ strategies
